x-enumeration-literals.name: Phone Number Alias
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The payee can be identified by a mobile or landline number.

Comment:
Use Case: Instant payment systems like mobile wallets or UPI (India), where the phone number is linked to the payees account.

Example: +1-555-123-4567

x-enumeration-literals.name: Email Address Alias
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The payee is identified via an email address.

Comment:
Use Case: Peer-to-peer payment apps or e-invoices where payments are sent using email.

Example: payee@example.com

x-enumeration-literals.name: IBAN / Account Number Alias
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A shorter or masked version of the actual bank account number.

Comment:
Use Case: Systems that dont want to expose full account numbers for security.

Example: IBAN: DE89 **** **** 1234 5678 90

x-enumeration-literals.name: UPI ID / Mobile Wallet ID Alias
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Identifier for payment systems like UPI, PayPal ID, or other digital wallets.

Comment:
Use Case: Digital and instant payments.

Example: payee@upi or john.doe@paypal

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Reference Alias
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A bank-specific or corporate-assigned code for the payee.

Comment:
Use Case: Corporate payments or recurring billers.

Example: VEND1234 or UTILITY9876

x-enumeration-literals.name: QR Code / Token Alias
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The payee alias is represented as a QR code or token that maps to an account.

Comment:
Use Case: Mobile and contactless payments in apps.
